name: Maharashtra Udyog Ratna Award Scheme
administered_by: Department of Industries, Government of Maharashtra
retrieval_text: Maharashtra Udyog Ratna is a state award scheme recognising outstanding manufacturing MSMEs in Maharashtra that have been in operation for at least two years and are GST-compliant. Award recipients receive a certificate, a trophy, and a grant of up to Rs 50 lakh based on investment in plant and machinery. The award is intended to promote industrial growth and job creation in Maharashtra and carries visibility benefits for accessing institutional credit. This scheme has no direct loan component; it provides a grant and recognition to performing MSME manufacturing units.
documents_required: PAN Card of the MSME entity
Fixed Asset Schedule (showing investment in Plant & Machinery)
Proof of Business Commencement (e.g., CA Certificate, initial sales invoices, or utility bills older than two years)
Business Premises Address Proof (e.g., electricity bill, rent agreement, property documents)
Bank Account Proof (Cancelled Cheque or bank statement header)
Memorandum of Association and Articles of Association / Partnership Deed / LLP Agreement (as applicable)
